# Rectangle with a gentle outward-bulging arc on the right side.
# Negative bulge = CW-perp side of start→end = +x for a vertical
# chord going +y, so the arc sweeps OUTWARD into +x.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
arc -0.3
200,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

generate
----
total_stalls: 70

snapshot
----
